example_sentences: The new office has a stylish and modern design.

english_explanations: A specific group of consumers at which a company aims its products and marketing.
example_sentences: Our target market is young professionals aged 25 to 35.

english_explanations: Relating to a telephone that generates tones when keys are pressed.
example_sentences: Please use a touch-tone phone to access the automated system.

english_explanations: A flat, shallow container with a raised rim, used for carrying or holding items.
example_sentences: Please place the documents in the incoming tray.

english_explanations: Easy to use or understand, especially for people without technical knowledge.
example_sentences: The software is designed to be user-friendly for beginners.

english_explanations: The amount of space occupied by a substance; the quantity or power of sound.
example_sentences: Sales volume has increased significantly this quarter.

english_explanations: A written guarantee promising to repair or replace a product if necessary within a period.
example_sentences: The laptop comes with a two-year warranty.

english_explanations: Impervious to water; not allowing water to pass through.
example_sentences: This watch is waterproof up to 100 meters.

english_explanations: To go somewhere with someone as a companion; to play music along with.
example_sentences: I will accompany you to the meeting.

english_explanations: One of two or more available possibilities; different from the usual or conventional.
example_sentences: We need to find an alternative supplier.

english_explanations: A platform projecting from the wall of a building, supported by columns or brackets.
example_sentences: The hotel room has a private balcony overlooking the sea.

english_explanations: Careful not to inconvenience or harm others; showing careful thought.
example_sentences: It was considerate of you to bring coffee for everyone.

english_explanations: Giving a feeling of comfort, warmth, and relaxation.
example_sentences: The lounge has a cozy atmosphere.

english_explanations: To go with someone to provide protection, guidance, or companionship.
example_sentences: Security will escort you to the conference room.

english_explanations: A movement of part of the body to express an idea or meaning; an action to convey feeling.
example_sentences: He made a gesture of apology.

english_explanations: An act of moving; a group of people working together for a shared goal.
example_sentences: The civil rights movement changed American society.

english_explanations: Being used by someone; having one's time filled with activity.
example_sentences: The restroom is occupied at the moment.

english_explanations: An area where cars and other vehicles can be parked.
example_sentences: The parking lot is located behind the building.

english_explanations: Not decorated or elaborate; simple or ordinary in character.
example_sentences: I prefer plain designs without too many decorations.

english_explanations: An established or official way of doing something; a series of actions.
example_sentences: Please follow the standard procedure for reporting incidents.

english_explanations: To enter or record on an official list; to sign up for something.
example_sentences: Please register at the front desk upon arrival.

english_explanations: To direct or escort someone to an upper floor or higher level.
example_sentences: Please send Mr. Smith up to the conference room.

english_explanations: A rough or unfinished drawing or painting; a brief written or spoken account.
example_sentences: The architect presented a sketch of the proposed building.

english_explanations: Of the highest quality; exceptionally good.
example_sentences: The hotel provides superb service to all guests.

english_explanations: Skill and sensitivity in dealing with others or with difficult issues.
example_sentences: Handling complaints requires a lot of tact.

english_explanations: To accompany or guide a person to a particular place.
example_sentences: I will take you to the manager's office.

english_explanations: Showing consideration for the needs of other people; absorbed in thought.
example_sentences: It was thoughtful of you to send a thank-you note.

english_explanations: Used to express regret about something disappointing or unpleasant.
example_sentences: Unfortunately, the flight has been cancelled.

english_explanations: Having an attractive and tasteful arrangement of furnishings and ornaments.
example_sentences: The well-decorated room created a welcoming atmosphere.

english_explanations: Able to be agreed on; satisfactory; adequate though not outstanding.
example_sentences: The quality of the product is acceptable for the price.

english_explanations: The edible young growth of bamboo, commonly used in Asian cuisine.
example_sentences: Bamboo shoot is a popular ingredient in Chinese dishes.

english_explanations: A soft white food made from coagulated soybean milk, popular in East Asian cooking.
example_sentences: Bean curd is an excellent source of plant protein.

english_explanations: Preserved and stored in a sealed metal container.
example_sentences: Canned fruits are convenient for long-term storage.

english_explanations: To look after someone or something; to like or want something.
example_sentences: Would you care for some dessert?

english_explanations: A shiny brown edible nut that develops within a prickly husk.
example_sentences: Roasted chestnuts are a popular winter snack.

english_explanations: Feeling or showing great pleasure.
example_sentences: We are delighted to welcome you as our guest.

english_explanations: The sweet course eaten at the end of a meal.
example_sentences: For dessert, we have chocolate cake or ice cream.

english_explanations: Cooked and served in a casserole dish, typically baked in the oven.
example_sentences: The chicken en casserole was delicious.

english_explanations: A place, amenity, or piece of equipment provided for a particular purpose.
example_sentences: The hotel has excellent sports facilities.

english_explanations: Containing a large amount of fat.
example_sentences: This cut of meat is quite fatty.

english_explanations: Producing good or useful results; fertile and productive.
example_sentences: The negotiation proved to be very fruitful.

english_explanations: A written or verbal request inviting someone to go somewhere or do something.
example_sentences: Thank you for the kind invitation to dinner.

english_explanations: A public room in a hotel or theater for waiting or relaxing; a comfortable sitting room.
example_sentences: Guests can relax in the hotel lounge.

english_explanations: The most substantial course of a meal, typically served after the starter.
example_sentences: The main course was grilled salmon with vegetables.

english_explanations: A fungal growth that typically takes the form of a domed cap on a stalk.
example_sentences: The dish is garnished with fresh mushrooms.

english_explanations: Present or existing from the beginning; not derived from something else; new and unique.
example_sentences: The original recipe has been passed down for generations.

english_explanations: A crispy snack made from starch and prawn, popular in Southeast Asian cuisine.
example_sentences: Prawn crackers are often served as an appetizer in Chinese restaurants.

english_explanations: A non-alcoholic beverage, typically carbonated and flavored.
example_sentences: Would you like a soft drink with your meal?

english_explanations: Magnificent; very impressive; extremely good.
example_sentences: We had a splendid time at the banquet.

english_explanations: The first course of a meal; a person or thing that starts something.
example_sentences: For the starter, I recommend the soup of the day.

english_explanations: Of great size, amount, or intensity; extremely good or wonderful.
example_sentences: The team did a terrific job on the presentation.

english_explanations: In a way that pleases or suits someone.
example_sentences: The room was decorated to her liking.

english_explanations: A person who does not eat meat; food suitable for such a person.
example_sentences: Do you have any vegetarian options on the menu?

english_explanations: Existing or occurring inside a particular country; relating to the home or family.
example_sentences: Domestic flights are usually cheaper than international ones.

english_explanations: The market within a country's own borders, as opposed to international markets.
example_sentences: The company focuses primarily on the domestic market.

english_explanations: Moving or leading toward a lower place or level.
example_sentences: There has been a downward trend in sales this quarter.

english_explanations: In a dramatic manner; very suddenly and noticeably.
example_sentences: Profits have increased dramatically over the past year.

english_explanations: A market in a foreign country where domestic goods are sold.
example_sentences: China is an important export market for many countries.

english_explanations: Parallel to the plane of the horizon; involving companies at the same stage of production.
example_sentences: The chart displays data in a horizontal format.

english_explanations: A complete list of items such as property, goods in stock, or contents.
example_sentences: We need to take inventory of all warehouse stock.

english_explanations: The work needed to keep something in proper condition; the act of maintaining.
example_sentences: Regular maintenance is essential for the equipment.

english_explanations: The portion of a market controlled by a particular company or product.
example_sentences: The company increased its market share by 5% this year.

english_explanations: The amount by which expenses exceed revenues; a negative profit.
example_sentences: The company reported a net loss for the fiscal year.

english_explanations: The actual profit after all expenses and taxes have been deducted from revenue.
example_sentences: The net profit margin improved compared to last quarter.

english_explanations: Revenue generated from a company's primary business activities.
example_sentences: Operating revenue grew by 12% this quarter.

english_explanations: The amount of something produced by a person, machine, or industry.
example_sentences: Factory output has increased since the new equipment was installed.

english_explanations: To take apart and examine thoroughly in order to repair; a thorough examination and repair.
example_sentences: The engine needs a complete overhaul.

english_explanations: The highest point of something; the point of greatest activity or achievement.
example_sentences: Sales reach their peak during the holiday season.

english_explanations: To stay at the same level without significant increase or decrease.
example_sentences: Despite market fluctuations, prices remain flat.

english_explanations: A way or course taken in getting from a starting point to a destination.
example_sentences: What is the most efficient delivery route?

english_explanations: Sufficiently great or important to be worthy of attention; having meaning.
example_sentences: There has been a significant improvement in performance.

english_explanations: In a regular and even manner; gradually and consistently.
example_sentences: The company has grown steadily over the past decade.

english_explanations: A general direction in which something is developing or changing.
example_sentences: There is a growing trend toward online shopping.

english_explanations: Violent or unsteady movement of air or water; a state of conflict or confusion.
example_sentences: The market experienced considerable turbulence last year.

english_explanations: The total amount of money taken by a business; or the rate at which employees leave.
example_sentences: Employee turnover has decreased since the new benefits were introduced.

english_explanations: At right angles to a horizontal plane; involving companies at different stages of production.
example_sentences: The chart shows a vertical line indicating the target.

english_explanations: The percentage change in a value compared to the same period in the previous year.
example_sentences: The company reported 15% year-on-year growth in revenue.

english_explanations: To add up in quantity or number; to be equivalent to in effect.
example_sentences: The total cost amounts to $5,000.

english_explanations: A failure of a machine or system to function; a detailed analysis of information.
example_sentences: Please provide a cost breakdown for the project.

english_explanations: Goods carried on a ship, aircraft, or motor vehicle.
example_sentences: The ship was carrying a cargo of electronic equipment.

english_explanations: Air travel and transport by aircraft other than military or state aircraft.
example_sentences: Civil aviation has grown rapidly in the past two decades.
